moments.title: Love Island Grand Finale
moments.blurb: The dramatic 2026 series of Love Island concludes on Monday, July 27th, live on ITV2 and ITVX, as the remaining couples battle for the £50,000 prize.

angles.name: Final Four Build-up
angles.copy: Who's making it to the final four? It's been a wild ride in the Love Island villa, and the grand finale is just days away! Who are you rooting for?

angles.name: Countdown to Winners
angles.copy: The countdown is ON for the Love Island 2026 final! Expect drama, declarations, and a whole lot of 'I've got a text!' Who do you think will be crowned the winners?

angles.name: Monday Night Finale
angles.copy: Monday night means one thing: the Love Island final! Grab your snacks, settle in, and get ready to see who takes home the cash and maybe, just maybe, true love.

moments.title: UK Heatwave Continues
moments.blurb: England and Wales are currently experiencing a prolonged heatwave with temperatures exceeding 30°C, and forecasters anticipate hot conditions could continue into early August, leading to hosepipe bans in several regions.

angles.name: General Heatwave Check-in
angles.copy: Another day, another scorcher! The UK heatwave rolls on with temps well over 30°C. How are you staying cool today?

angles.name: Hosepipe Bans Reminder
angles.copy: Sun's out, but so are the hosepipe bans! With the heatwave set to continue, water restrictions are in place across parts of the UK. Are you affected?

angles.name: Devon Local Heat
angles.copy: Devon is sizzling! With temperatures hitting 33°C last weekend, the heatwave is making itself felt across the South West. Stay hydrated!

angles.name: Wales Local Heat
angles.copy: Wales is feeling the heat! As the heatwave continues, remember to look after yourselves and check on vulnerable neighbours.

moments.title: Official Singles Chart #1
moments.blurb: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean hold the top spot with "Rein Me In" on the Official Singles Chart, while Oasis's "Wonderwall" makes a massive return to number 2. The new chart is revealed this Friday.

angles.name: Chart Overview
angles.copy: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean still reigning supreme at #1 on the singles chart! But who saw Oasis's 'Wonderwall' back at #2?! What a comeback!

angles.name: Oasis Comeback
angles.copy: It's 2026 and Oasis are back in the Top 3! 'Wonderwall' is currently sitting pretty at #2 on the Official Singles Chart. Still got it!

angles.name: New Chart Anticipation
angles.copy: New chart day is Friday! Can Sam Fender & Olivia Dean hold onto #1, or will Oasis climb even higher? Who are you backing for the top spot?

moments.title: Truck Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: Oxfordshire's Truck Festival, one of the UK's longest-running small music festivals, starts tomorrow, running until Sunday with The Maccabees, Two Door Cinema Club, and The Wombats headlining.

angles.name: Festival Excitement
angles.copy: Ready for a weekend of live music? Truck Festival kicks off tomorrow in Oxfordshire with a huge indie lineup! Who's heading to Hill Farm?

angles.name: Headliners Highlight
angles.copy: The Maccabees, Two Door Cinema Club, The Wombats... Truck Festival is bringing the indie anthems this weekend! What's your must-see act?

moments.title: Latitude Festival Begins
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival returns to Henham Park in Suffolk from tomorrow until Sunday, featuring a diverse lineup of music, comedy, and arts.

angles.name: Suffolk Local Focus
angles.copy: Suffolk, are you ready for Latitude? The festival gates open tomorrow for a weekend of incredible music, comedy, and arts. Who are you excited to see?

angles.name: Diverse Lineup
angles.copy: Latitude Festival is back! From tomorrow, Henham Park will be buzzing with a fantastic mix of artists. What's on your Latitude agenda?

moments.title: Depot In The Castle, Cardiff
moments.blurb: Depot In The Castle brings a day of live music to Cardiff Castle this Saturday, July 25th.

angles.name: Cardiff Local Call
angles.copy: Cardiff! Your castle awaits! Depot In The Castle is this Saturday with a full day of live music. Who's joining the party?

angles.name: Iconic Venue
angles.copy: This weekend, Cardiff Castle is the place to be for Depot In The Castle! Get ready for some epic tunes in an iconic setting.

moments.title: Mick Jagger Turns 83
moments.blurb: The legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday on Sunday, July 26th.

angles.name: Rock Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 83rd Birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger! The Rolling Stones icon is still rocking harder than anyone. What's your favourite Stones track?

angles.name: Age is Just a Number
angles.copy: Still got the moves! Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday this Sunday. From 'Satisfaction' to stadium tours, what a career!

moments.title: Happy Birthday, Stormzy!
moments.blurb: Grime superstar Stormzy celebrates his 33rd birthday on Sunday, July 26th.

angles.name: Grime King Birthday
angles.copy: Big Mike turns 33! Happy Birthday to the incredible Stormzy this Sunday. What's your favourite track from the South London don?

angles.name: Impactful Artist
angles.copy: Wishing a massive Happy Birthday to Stormzy on Sunday! The trailblazing grime artist is 33. What an impact he's made!

moments.title: Happy Birthday J.Lo!
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday on Thursday, July 24th.

angles.name: J.Lo's Age Defiance
angles.copy: Can you believe J.Lo is 57 on Thursday? Jennifer Lopez still brings the heat! What's your favourite J.Lo anthem?

angles.name: Triple Threat Birthday
angles.copy: It's Jennifer Lopez's birthday on Thursday! The ultimate triple threat turns 57. Which of her hits gets you on the dancefloor?

moments.title: Happy Birthday, Kate Bush!
moments.blurb: The iconic and influential singer-songwriter Kate Bush celebrates her 68th birthday on Tuesday, July 30th.

angles.name: Iconic Artist Birthday
angles.copy: Running up that hill and into her 68th year! Happy Birthday to the extraordinary Kate Bush this Tuesday. What's your favourite track from her?

angles.name: Unique Sound
angles.copy: The incomparable Kate Bush turns 68 on Tuesday! Her unique sound has captivated generations. Which of her songs is a classic for you?

moments.title: Belladrum Tartan Heart Festival
moments.blurb: The Belladrum Tartan Heart Festival returns to the Scottish Highlands from July 30th to August 1st, featuring James, The Human League, and Callum Beattie.

angles.name: Scottish Festival Call
angles.copy: Scotland, get ready for Belladrum! The Tartan Heart Festival kicks off next week with James, The Human League and more. Who's heading to the Highlands?

angles.name: Festival Lineup Buzz
angles.copy: Three days of music, arts and community! Belladrum Tartan Heart Festival is just around the corner. Are you ready for 'Bella'?

moments.title: Y-Not Festival in Derbyshire
moments.blurb: Y-Not Festival brings its indie-fueled spirit back to the Peak District from July 30th to August 2nd, with headliners including The Libertines and Two Door Cinema Club.

angles.name: Headliner Hype
angles.copy: Headliners The Libertines and Two Door Cinema Club! Y-Not Festival is back in Derbyshire next week for another epic weekend. Who's got tickets?

angles.name: Peak District Vibes
angles.copy: Deep in the Peak District, Y-Not Festival is ready to ignite! Get set for four days of fantastic live music, starting July 30th.

moments.title: Happy Birthday, Fatboy Slim!
moments.blurb: Legendary DJ and producer Fatboy Slim, Norman Cook, celebrates his 63rd birthday on Wednesday, July 31st.

angles.name: Big Beat Birthday
angles.copy: Right here, right now, it's Fatboy Slim's birthday on Wednesday! The Big Beat legend turns 63. What's your favourite track to get the party started?

angles.name: Praise You
angles.copy: Happy Birthday to the one and only Fatboy Slim! Norman Cook celebrates 63 years of making us 'Praise You' on Wednesday.

moments.title: Joe Elliott Turns 67
moments.blurb: Def Leppard frontman Joe Elliott celebrates his 67th birthday on Thursday, August 1st.

angles.name: Rock Anthem Birthday
angles.copy: Pour some sugar on him! Def Leppard's Joe Elliott turns 67 this Thursday. What's your ultimate Def Leppard anthem?

angles.name: Def Leppard Frontman
angles.copy: Wishing a massive Happy Birthday to Joe Elliott of Def Leppard on August 1st! Still bringing the rock after all these years.
